_comment: Per-test measured ceilings (not a uniform placeholder). Local means (Apple M-series, Python 3.13): status ~1.2ms, phase-start ~1.4ms, phase-end ~9.8ms, pivot-check ~0.037ms. CI ubuntu-latest observed range 0.5-11ms (see docs/perf-budget.md). Each baseline is set at a clean ceiling above the worst observed local mean with CI headroom; phase-end gets the largest ceiling (~2.6x local mean) because it performs real evidence-gate I/O. The regression gate is mean <= baseline * BASELINE_TOLERANCE (1.25); see tests/test_perf.py and docs/perf-budget.md. Refresh procedure: docs/perf-budget.md.
